case_title: COMBS REPORTING, INC. VS. DENNIS VANN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMBS REPORTING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2011 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-06-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF(JC) STATES THAT THE DEFENDANT(JD) PROVIDED A PERSONAL CHECK TO PLAINTIFF(JC) TO SATISFY THE JUDGMENT ON SEPTEMBER 21, 2011. IF NO APPEARANCE ORDER OF EXAMINATION WILL BE DISCHARGED. PLAINTIFF(JC) WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WITH THE COURT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(JC) ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-16-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VANN, DENNIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,246.19 FILED BY COMBS REPORTING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VANN, DENNIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COMBS REPORTING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VANN, DENNIS $1,030.00 PRINCIPAL, $108.57 INTEREST, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,243.57, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT VANN, DENNIS HEARING SET FOR SEP-22-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
